assertions.reason: The launch flow failed before any queued runs existed, so queued-run cancellation could not be exercised.
The launch flow failed before any running runs existed, so cancellationRequestedAt/heartbeat stop signaling could not be exercised.
No active study state was reachable, so cancellation fan-out to a cancelled study state could not be observed.
Audit trail data for cancellation is not exposed on the current user surface, and no cancellable active study could be produced.
Once the study was terminal failed after launch, the overview exposed no Cancel Study control, so terminal studies were not cancellable from the browser surface.
A cancellable persona_review state was not reachable because the launch flow failed instead of settling into persona_review.
Replaying was never reached through the real browser flow, so replay cancellation could not be exercised.
The study never reached an active execution state with queued/running runs, so cancellation propagation across overview and runs pages could not be validated.

blockers: The launch flow failed before any active or replaying study state was available to cancel.
